description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house surrounded by a low, textured perimeter wall. The structure features a complex, multi-hipped roof with brown shingles and several prominent gables. The front facade includes a wide double-door entry, a covered porch with white railings, and multiple tall, white-framed windows arranged in symmetrical rows. The house has a spacious wooden deck area on one side, and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof. The property includes outdoor spaces such as a patio with furniture and a fenced yard.
description: A large, two-story house with a multi-hipped brown roof, white exterior walls, a covered porch, and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entry, covered porch with white railings, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the perimeter wall, and the extended porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio with outdoor furniture, and the arrangement of windows on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side wall, and the continuation of the perimeter fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with steps, covered porch, white railings, and a wooden deck
